Supplied large weighted graph for search and heuristic comparison.

planning_cases.description: Fetch the keycard, collect the parcel, unlock the lab door, and deliver the parcel.
Without the lock, the plan no longer needs the keycard or the unlock action.
Changing the map connectivity changes the whole plan structure.
